title: Dekton 6pc Screwdriver Set-Durable & Ergonomic Design| Includes Phillips & Slotted Tips| Precision-Machined for Accurate Fit| Comfortable Non-Slip Handles| Essential Kit for DIY, Repairs & Maintenance
features: Durable & Ergonomic Design: The Dekton 6pc Screwdriver Set features a robust and ergonomic design, crafted for long-lasting performance and user comfort. Each screwdriver is built with durability in mind, using high-quality materials that can withstand rigorous use while ensuring comfortable handling for extended periods.

Precision-Machined for Accurate Fit: The screwdrivers in this set are precision-machined to ensure a perfect fit with screws. This meticulous machining process enhances accuracy, reduces stripping, and improves overall efficiency when tightening or loosening screws. The exact fit also helps in maintaining the integrity of screw heads and surrounding materials.

Comfortable Non-Slip Handles: Designed with user comfort in mind, each screwdriver features a non-slip handle that provides a secure and comfortable grip. The ergonomic handle design reduces hand fatigue and allows for better control, even in slippery or challenging conditions. This ensures that you can work with precision and ease.

Essential Kit for DIY, Repairs & Maintenance: The Dekton 6pc Screwdriver Set is an essential toolkit for any DIY enthusiast, homeowner, or professional. It is ideal for a wide range of applications, including home repairs, maintenance tasks, and construction projects.

Includes Phillips & Slotted Tips: This versatile set includes both Phillips and slotted tips, catering to a wide range of tasks. Whether you’re working on electronics, furniture assembly, or general repairs, the variety of tips ensures that you have the right tool for the job. Each tip is precision-engineered to provide a secure fit and prevent slippage.
description: From the manufacturer 6PC ASSORTED SCREWDRIVER SET Magnetic tips. Flat: 3 x 75mm, 5 x 100mm, 6 x 150mm. Phillips: PH1 x 75mm, PH2 x 100mm, PH3 x 150mm. Soft grip screwdriver handles are ergonomically designed delivering greater grip and torque. FEATURES VARIETY OF SIZES FOR MOST JOBS Designed for professionals in mind. Durable and wear-resistant. Cushion grip handle for comfort and control. Easy to use. PHILLIPS AND FLAT Flat: 3 x 75mm, 5 x 100mm, 6 x 150mm. Phillips: PH1 x 75mm, PH2 x 100mm, PH3 x 150mm. STRONG MAGNETIC TIPS Strong magnetic tips. Screwdriver tips attract them easily, and make it easy to take them out after unraveling. The blackening treatment prevent to rust effectively. IDEAL FOR: Industrial / Construction. Electricians / Mechanics.
